title: ODMod
description: This project adds realistic ODM from Attack on Titan
body:
**ODM Mod**
A Minecraft mod that introduces Omni-Directional Movement (ODM) gear inspired by Attack on Titan, allowing players to zip around the world with grappling hooks and 3D maneuvering for epic battles and exploration!

**Description**
This mod adds ODM gear mechanics to Minecraft, giving you the ability to swing through the air, dodge obstacles, and slash with swords tethered to grappling hooks. Perfect for parkour enthusiasts, PvP servers, or just exploring vast landscapes in a new way. Inspired by the anime/manga series Attack on Titan, it brings intense mobility to vanilla gameplay.

**Features**
ODM Gear Item: Craft and equip it to access grappling and anchoring mechanics.
Grappling Hooks: Launch hooks to walls, ceilings, or surfaces for swinging and climbing.
Maneuvering System: Gas-powered movement for high-speed dashes and combat maneuvers.
3D Movement: Break free from 2D constraints with full aerial control.
Multiplayer Compatible: Works with friends for team-based Titan hunts or races.

**Requirements**
Minecraft Version: 1.20+ (specify if different).
Mod Loader: Forge.
Dependencies: geckolib.

**Installation**
Download the latest JAR file from the Releases section.
Place the JAR into your .minecraft/mods folder.
Launch Minecraft and enjoy! Ensure your game version matches to avoid crashes.

**Usage**
Crafting ODM Gear: Combine leather, leadoval, steel_block, steel_ingot and plastic at a crafting table.
How to Use: T to Activate ODM; hold the maneuver key (configurable in controls) to propel yourself. Aim at surfaces for anchor points.

**Screenshots**

![ODM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd5160dc1409af894d59873d85a00183d6839c06.png)
